rows.label: qev025202_MSG0001
rows.name:
Good work out there. How's business?
Judging by your face, not too well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0002
rows.name:
Trouble with a Ma-non at a city store?
Again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0003
rows.name:
We've been getting a lot of those lately.
Complaints about not being allowed in, or sanitation concerns...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0004
rows.name: Ah... So it's that kind of issue again, is it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0005
rows.name:
Detailed medical checks are conducted on all Ma-non
the moment it was decided we would share living spaces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0006
rows.name:
Of course, there is zero evidence that any unique pathogens
have ever been found.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0007
rows.name:
We've continued to perform regular checkups since then.
Biologically speaking, the Ma-non are completely safe aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm not saying I don't understand the citizens' feelings,
but if they don't get used to them, we won't be able to survive either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0009
rows.name:
You know it too, don't you?
Half of our military industry now depends on their technology,
and Ma-non corporations are the stars of the economy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0010
rows.name:
Could you please go back and advise that boutique owner
to recognize the current situation if she wants political backing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0011
rows.name:
Tell her that society is already moving forward,
and her own perceptions need an update.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0012
rows.name:
For us to survive on Mira moving forward,
cooperation with the Ma-non is absolutely essential.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025202_MSG0013
rows.name:
I just hope that store owner realizes that
sooner rather than later...[ST:wait ]
